zh.Kleef, Hilden, Mettmann, North Rhine-Wes: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫梅特曼希爾登可利福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich IV. von Kleve於1129年出生在可列福時，他的父親Arnold I. von Kleve45歲，母親Ida van Leuven-Brabant21歲。他和Adelheid von Sulzbach至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他於1147年被列為graf von kleve。他去世於1172年4月27日在他的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.Kleef, Hilden, Mettmann, North Rhine-Wes: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫梅特曼希爾登可利福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dietrich IV. von Kleve于1129年出生在可列福时，他的父亲Arnold I. von Kleve45岁，母亲Ida van Leuven-Brabant21岁。他和Adelheid von Sulzbach至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他于1147年被列为graf von kleve。他去世于1172年4月27日在他的家乡享年43岁。

en.Kleef, Hilden, Mettmann, North Rhine-Wes: Kleef, Hilden, Mettmann, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
German: variant of   Klever   2.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

variants.name: Cleve
meanings: English: variant of   Cliff  .
German: variant of   Kleve  .

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from þeud ‘people’ + rīc ‘power’. See Terry .

variants.name: Diederick
meanings: from þeud ‘people’ + rīc ‘power’. See Terry .

nameMeanings.name: IV.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich IV. von Kleve was born in 1129, in Cleves, his father, Arnold I. von Kleve, was 45 and his mother, Ida van Leuven-Brabant, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Adelheid von Sulzbach. In 1147, his occupation is listed as graf von kleve. He died on 27 April 1172, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich IV. von Kleve est né en 1129, à Kleve, son père, Arnold I. von Kleve, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Ida van Leuven-Brabant, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Adelheid von Sulzbach. En 1147, sa profession de son indiquée est graf von kleve. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1172, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dietrich IV. von Kleve 1129 in Kleve geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnold I. von Kleve 45 und seine Mutter Ida van Leuven-Brabant 21. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Sulzbach mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1147 ist sein Beruf als graf von kleve aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. April 1172 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich IV. von Kleve è nato il nel 1129 nel Kleve, il suo padre, Arnold I. von Kleve, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Ida van Leuven-Brabant, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Adelheid von Sulzbach. Nel 1147, la sua occupazione è indicata come graf von kleve. Morì il 27 aprile 1172, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメ
ja.Kleef, Hilden, Mettmann, North Rhine-Wes: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンメットマンヒルデンクリーフ
ja.lifeSummary: Dietrich IV. von Kleveが1129年にクレブで生まれた時，父Arnold I. von Kleveは45歳，母Ida van Leuven-Brabantは21歳であった。彼はAdelheid von Sulzbachとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1147年，職業はgraf von kleveと記録されている。彼は1172年4月27日に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich IV. von Kleve(이)가 1129년 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnold I. von Kleve(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida van Leuven-Brabant(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Sulzbach(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1147년, 그의 직업은 graf von kleve이었다. 그는 1172년 4월 27일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich IV. von Kleve nasceu em 1129, em Kleve, seu pai, Arnold I. von Kleve, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Ida van Leuven-Brabant, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Adelheid von Sulzbach. Em 1147, sua profissão aparece como graf von kleve. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1172, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich IV. von Kleve родился в 1129 г. в местности клив, его отцу по имени Arnold I. von Kleve было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida van Leuven-Brabant, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Adelheid von Sulzbach. В 1147 году он работал по профессии graf von kleve. Он умер 27 апреля 1172 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

sm.Between 1147 and 1172: mai le 1147 e o'o I le 1172

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dietrich IV. von Kleve nació en 1129, en Kleve, su papá, Arnold I. von Kleve, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Ida van Leuven-Brabant, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Adelheid von Sulzbach. En 1147, su ocupación registrada era graf von kleve. Murió el 27 de abril de 1172, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
